initial_entry.author: Tom Leonhardt
initial_entry.description: A task board that reads and writes a single Tasks-plugin-format Markdown file, grouped by configurable tags. Designed for Carl Pullein's Time Sector System, usable with any tag scheme. Creating and editing tasks uses the Tasks plugin's own input modal (required). - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.
